info.title: TwitterAPI Unified API
info.description: Unified OpenAPI 3.0 specification for TwitterAPI endpoints.

query.description: The search query string that opens this trend's results.

target.description: The search target this trend resolves to.

rank.description: Position of the trend in the list, where a smaller number ranks higher.

meta_description.description: Supplementary descriptive text for the trend, such as associated post volume or context.

trends.description: The list of trending topics for the requested location.

status.description: Whether the request succeeded or errored.

msg.description: Accompanying message, typically the error detail when the request did not succeed.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the Space, such as whether it is scheduled, live, or ended.

scheduled_start.description: When the Space is scheduled to start.

updated_at.description: When the Space's record was last updated.

media_key.description: Media key referencing the Space's audio stream.

is_subscribed.description: Whether the requesting user is subscribed to the Space.

conversation_controls.description:
Coded value indicating who is permitted to participate in the conversation.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该整数各取值的含义，待研发确认。]

disallow_join.description: Whether new participants are blocked from joining the Space.

is_employee_only.description: Whether the Space is restricted to employees only.

is_muted.description: Whether the Space is muted for the requesting user.

is_space_available_for_clipping.description: Whether clips may be created from the Space.

is_space_available_for_replay.description: Whether a replay of the Space is available.

narrow_cast_space_type.description:
Coded value indicating the Space's narrowcast type.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明该整数各取值的含义，待研发确认。]

max_guest_sessions.description: Maximum number of concurrent guest speaker sessions allowed.

max_admin_capacity.description: Maximum number of admins the Space can have.

total_participants.description: Total number of participants across the Space.

location.description: Location listed on the creator's profile.

url.description: Website URL listed on the creator's profile.

description.description: Bio text on the creator's profile.

protected.description: Whether the creator's account is protected (private).

isVerified.description: Whether the creator's account is verified.

isBlueVerified.description: Whether the creator holds a Twitter Blue verification.

verifiedType.description: The kind of verification the creator's account holds.

followers.description: Number of accounts following the creator.

following.description: Number of accounts the creator follows.

favouritesCount.description: Number of tweets the creator has liked.

statusesCount.description: Number of tweets the creator has posted.

mediaCount.description: Number of media items the creator has posted.

createdAt.description: When the creator's account was created.

coverPicture.description: URL of the creator's profile cover image.

profilePicture.description: URL of the creator's profile avatar.

canDm.description: Whether the requesting user can send the creator a direct message.

affiliatesHighlightedLabel.description: Highlighted affiliation label shown on the creator's profile.

isAutomated.description: Whether the creator's account is marked as automated (a bot).

automatedBy.description: Identifier of the account that manages this automated account.

creator.description: Profile of the user who created the Space.

status.description: Whether the request succeeded or errored.

msg.description: Accompanying message, typically the error detail when the request did not succeed.

get.description: Return the list of trending topics for a given location, identified by its WOEID.

parameters.name: woeid
parameters.description: The WOEID (Where On Earth ID) identifying the location whose trends you want.

get.description: Return the full details of a single Twitter Space, including its settings, audience stats, and creator profile.

parameters.name: space_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the Twitter Space to look up.
